bird.name: Tawitawi brown dove
bird.summary: The Tawitawi brown dove (Phapitreron cinereiceps), also dark-eared brown dove, is a threatened species of bird in the family Columbidae not…

relations.subject: Tawitawi brown dove
relations.evidence: Although threatened by habitat loss, the rate of loss significantly reduced from 2004 to 2007, and it was thus downlisted from Critically Endangered to Endangered status in the 2007 IUCN Red List
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

relations.subject: Tawitawi brown dove
relations.evidence: This species' main threat is habitat loss, with wholesale clearance of forest habitats as a result of legal and illegal logging, mining and conversion into farmlands through slash-and-burn agriculture
relations.object_summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。
